markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, refresh strategy, and 2026 planning.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Comparison Article Strategy:** Dave will review a comparison article to test the standard pipeline's ability to handle nuanced positioning. If it fails, GrowthX will build a custom pipeline for these articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Content Refresh Project:** Relay will refresh its entire library of outdated SEO content (2021–2022) to improve SEO and compliance. This will use a GrowthX pipeline that updates content on existing, high-ranking URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**2026 Content Expansion:** GrowthX will deliver a proposal next week for a "Blog 3.0" project, starting with one deep-dive vertical per quarter (e.g., Home Services) to manage complexity and learn iteratively.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [**Holiday Planning:** Bailey will send an async update tomorrow. Jacob will deliver the monthly report early next week to support Relay's January board meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

## Topics

### Comparison Article Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The standard content pipeline struggles with the subtle positioning required for comparison articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Solution:** Dave will review one comparison article to assess the pipeline's output.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [**If it fails:** GrowthX will build a custom pipeline for this article type.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [**If it passes:** No change is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Compliance Constraint:** Relay cannot use definitive claims like "Relay is best."](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [**Approved Framing:** Factual statements and tailored recommendations (e.g., "good for X needs").](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
  - [**Positioning Artifacts:** GrowthX can use Relay's internal "battle cards" or create a positioning document from a meeting transcript to guide content.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)

### Content Refresh Project

  - [**Decision:** Refresh outdated SEO content (2021–2022) on existing URLs instead of creating new pages.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Retains SEO momentum, as many old pages still drive traffic and approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will use a dedicated "refresher pipeline" to update content without disrupting rankings.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
      - [**Process:** Relay provides a URL list → GrowthX updates stats, deepens context, and adds internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Scope:** This can be a separate project or replace new article delivery for a period.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### 2026 Content Expansion & Planning

  - [**Project Vision ("Blog 3.0"):** A richer, more interactive content experience with verticalized content.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Goal:** Launch one deep-dive vertical per quarter, starting with Home Services.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
      - [**Format:** Mix of content types, not just a stack of articles.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [**Proposal:** GrowthX will deliver a proposal next week with:](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Scope and budget for microsite editorial support.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Examples of similar projects for other clients.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [A "menu" of other content services (e.g., help center, new formats).](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [**January Board Meeting:** Relay will need specific reports.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [**Action:** Bethany will define requirements for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**Annual Planning:** A future meeting will align content strategy with Relay's 2026 goals.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1211.0)

### Pipeline & Reporting Updates

  - [**Content Approvals:** Dave approved 5 articles, clearing the pipeline for the week of Jan 5.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [**Bug Fix:** A blog post failed to publish due to a trailing space in the Contentful URL slug. Dave fixed it.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [**Dec 19:** Bailey sends async update.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [**Next Week:** Bailey is out; Jacob will deliver the monthly report by Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Dave:** Review one comparison article to test the standard pipeline and report findings to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Katie:** Compile a list of outdated comparison articles for the refresh project.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Bethany:** Define reporting requirements for the January board meeting and send to Bailey.](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Send async holiday update (Dec 19).](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
      - [Deliver monthly report (by Dec 24).](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Deliver 2026 content expansion proposal (next week).](https://fathom.video/share/8jbNhLp8ffdTcUqKwbPLRuXj8g_hRpoy?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
